description: Source of truth for what update.wb is allowed to overwrite. Do not edit without bumping version.
_template_dev_only_doc: Files tracked in the ai-workbench template repo for template-dev work but purged from stamped wbs by init.wb (Step 3.4b) so collaborators do not inherit template-dev state. The overlap with user_owned .ralph/** is intentional: init.wb is responsible for the one-time purge of the template's .ralph/ at stamp; user_owned governs update.wb's leave-alone policy thereafter (so subsequent updates do not touch any .ralph/ a team has chosen to keep). Update this list whenever a new template-dev-only file is added.
_auto_generated_doc: Files written by the repo-context-scan skill via wb.rescan. Tracked by the ai-devkit context-scan wrapper (lib/wb-context-scan.zsh). update.wb may overwrite the body of these files; user-authored YAML frontmatter keys are preserved via defensive merge. Transient staging lives under .context-scan/ (gitignored).
